name: Sour Liquor Aroma
descs:
[Effects apply only to #1, #2 Deployed Identities]

Skills that apply(including on self) [Vibration] Potency or Count gain 'Offense Level' +2

If the main target has [Vibration] and is Staggered, deal +(Stagger Level x 7.5)% damage with the Skill

When attacking an enemy with a Skill that applies [Vibration] Potency or Count, deal +(Stagger Level x 15)% damage with the Skill instead

[Effects apply only to #1, #2, and #3 Deployed Identities]

Skills that apply(including on self) [Vibration] Potency or Count gain 'Offense Level' +2

If the main target has [Vibration] and is Staggered, deal +(Stagger Level x 10)% damage with the Skill

When attacking an enemy with a Skill that applies [Vibration] Potency or Count, deal +(Stagger Level x 20)% damage with the Skill instead

[Effects apply only to #1, #2, and #3 Deployed Identities]

Skills that apply(including on self) [Vibration] Potency or Count gain Offense Level +3

If the main target has [Vibration] and is Staggered, deal +(Stagger Level x 12.5)% damage with the Skill

When attacking an enemy with a Skill that applies [Vibration] Potency or Count, deal +(Stagger Level x 25)% damage with the Skill instead
